---
title: "Rowing Intro"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
crew2k <- read_csv("keelinjoyce/rowing/crew2k.csv")
crew6k <- read_csv("keelinjoyce/rowing/crew6k.csv")
```

## 6k change

```{r}
ggplot(data = crew6k, aes(x = Goal, y = Split)) +
  geom_point()

crew6k <- crew6k |> filter(Date == "6-Feb" | Date == "27-Feb") |> 
  mutate(Piece = factor(Piece)) |>
  group_by(ID) |>
  mutate(n = n()) |>
  filter(n == 2)

crew6k_wide <- crew6k |> pivot_wider(id_cols = 
                                          ID,
                            names_from = "Date",
                            values_from = "Time") |>
  mutate(diff = `27-Feb` - `6-Feb`)

crew6k_change <- crew6k |> group_by(ID) |>
  mutate(diff = diff(Split)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(change = if_else(diff > 0,
                          true = "inc",
                          false = "dec"))

ggplot(data = crew6k_change, aes(x = Date, y = Split)) +
         geom_line(aes(group = ID, colour = change), alpha = 0.3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#DC3220", "#005AB5")) +
  scale_y_reverse()

```

## 2k change

```{r}
crew2k <- crew2k |> filter(Date == "17-Mar" | Date == "12-Feb" | Date == "16-Feb" | Date == "18-Mar") |> 
  group_by(ID) |>
  mutate(n = n()) |>
  filter(n == 2) |>
  mutate(test = if_else(Date == "12-Feb" | Date == "16-Feb",
                          true = "first",
                          false = "second"))|>
  mutate(Time = factor(Time))

crew2k_wide <- crew2k |> pivot_wider(id_cols = 
                                          ID,
                            names_from = "test",
                            values_from = "Time") 

crew2k_change <- crew2k_wide |> 
  mutate(change = if_else(second > first,
                          true = "inc",
                          false = "dec"))

ggplot(data = crew2k_change, aes(x = test, y = Split)) +
         geom_line(aes(group = ID, colour = change), alpha = 0.3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#DC3220", "#005AB5")) +
  scale_y_reverse()


```
